name: query_results_widget
description: Interactive query results visualization widget with chart and table views

name: feature_flags_setup_guidance_resource
description: Best-practice guidance for creating and configuring a Mixpanel feature flag before launch: routing the request to the right flag type (Feature Gate vs Dynamic Config vs Experiment), gathering the required inputs per flag type, naming and keying conventions, and the disabled-by-default lifecycle that follows creation.

name: feature_flags_lifecycle_guidance_resource
description: Best-practice guidance for managing a Mixpanel feature flag after creation: enabling and staged rollout, kill-switch usage, exposure tracking, hygiene/cleanup and archival, and the experiment-linkage lifecycle sync.

name: experiments_setup_guidance_resource
description: Best-practice guidance for designing a Mixpanel experiment before launch: writing a falsifiable hypothesis, picking primary/guardrail/secondary metrics that test it, sizing the experiment from historical baseline data, and choosing a testing model and end condition.

name: experiments_results_interpretation_guidance_resource
description: Best-practice guidance for interpreting Mixpanel experiment results and making ship/iterate/kill decisions: trustworthiness checks (SRM, Retro A/A, duration), statistical and practical significance, goal-direction polarity, guardrail evaluation, and root-causing common health-check failures.
